name: google
description: Google Merchant API developer workflows and migration guidance for agent-driven coding sessions.

interface.longDescription: Provides Merchant API domain guidance for Shopping integrations, including Content API migration help, code generation patterns, and API error troubleshooting.
defaultPrompt: How do I insert a product using the Merchant API in Python?
Help migrate this integration from Content API to Merchant API.
Troubleshoot this Merchant API 400 validation error and suggest a fix.
